productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Casual Black Wallet
description: Crafted from soft leather, this black wallet from United Colours Of Benetton is fabulously stylish and well organised. This two fold wallet has lots of inner storage making it perfect for everyday use Dimensions: 11.2 cm X 9.4 cm Has two main compartments Six credit card slots on either side Two slip pockets on either side for coins, id and business cards Brand name embossed on the top Care Do not machine wash Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
